title: We met online.
body: It started through Instagram — the way so many things do these days. Casual. Unplanned. What began as small conversations about nothing in particular slowly became something I looked forward to.

title: Random talks about everything.
body: Life, school, interests, memes. The kind of things you share with someone when you're still figuring out who they are — and quietly realizing you want to keep finding out.

title: Talking to her became something I genuinely looked forward to.
body: Over time, she opened up more — about her studies, football, thoughts, worries. And I found myself paying attention in a way I hadn't expected.

title: She made ordinary days feel lighter.
body: Without even trying. That's a rare thing. Most people don't know they're doing it. I'm not sure she did either.

title: She deactivated Instagram to focus on life.
body: And just like that, the conversations stopped. No dramatic ending. No goodbye. Just — quiet. The sudden silence made me realize how much her presence had become part of my routine.
